description:
Mystical Ninja Starring Goemon is a 3D action-adventure game for the Nintendo 64.
Play as Goemon and his friends as they travel across Japan to stop the evil Mangamore Corps
from turning Japan into a giant stage. Explore towns, dungeons, and pilot giant robots!

v.1.0.6.description:
New Features
- Ryo in the pool
- Pots in the pool
- More Rando Spawn locations

Bug fixes
- Demo screen granting items
- Implemented a debug item text just in case a location fails to get an item name
- Game over no longer lcears saves
- Deathlink *should* be fixed (I'll be straight, untested)
v.1.0.6.title: v1.0.6

v1.0.0.description:
This is the first release of the Recomp Rando for Mystical Ninja Starring Goemon.
In this release is the apworld, the mod pack, AND for the short term an updated version of the client itself. 

When Klorfmorf publishes an update to https://github.com/klorfmorf/Goemon64Recomp I'll be removing the client version from here.

But in the short term you'll need to use this version to play.

The installation guide and usage is explained in the Readme.md
v1.0.0.title: v1.0.0 Initial Release

v1.0.1.description:
Fixes a bunch of bugs, issues with the AP world logic having slight issues. 
Repairs deathlink, spawn position issues, minor logic issues and a crash in the Zazen Town pond.
v1.0.1.title: v1.0.1 Bug Fix Central

v1.0.10.description:
New Features
Music Rando

Bug Fixes
More pots *shakes fist at pots*
v1.0.10.title: v.1.0.10

v1.0.11.description:
### New Features

- Lowers Ryo cost for cucumber
- Fast text option for those who want to spam through cutscenes
- Music rando now has a "group by area" option

### Bug fixes

- Fixes some pot logic again.
- Increases pot ryo value if granted via AP
- Fixes Spawn Position issues
- Tries to fix missing starting character issues from reloading a save
- Adjusts names in Apworld Hints
- Adjusts location logic to be dynamic so we will have less broken releases
- Changes strength checks to be a count instead of a particular item
- Codebase Refactor
- Fixes bought store items from not saving
- Fixes scenario text for cutscene textboxes that were not previously updating
- We now double set a value when you beat Thaisamba out of safety
- UT is now supported with a yaml in your players folder
- Genning is now more stabler
v1.0.11.title: v1.0.11

v1.0.12.description:
### Bugfixes

- Fixes Folkypoke, Yamato, Kompira names
- Fixes game crash with Flute if you haven't visited a location yet
- Fixed missing gourmet sub items
- Fixed superpass guards not being pre opened if you have the item
- Fixes Priest son dialogue 
- Removes some duplicate pots
- Fixes Mini Ebismaru text
- Fixes Sudden Impact Text
- Fixes Mermaid textbox
- Fully changes the backend for music rando, should work as properly expected now
- Adjusted some region names to have areas names in them
v1.0.12.title: v1.0.12

v1.0.13.description:
Bug Fixes
Spawn bugs have been corrected fully
Adjusted logic issues in Festival Temple
Fixed missing starting items
Fixed area music rando
Fixed flute text overrun
Fixes issues with Chokagku door not being in logic
Fixes logic for start with all warps
v1.0.13.title: v1.0.13

v1.0.14.description:
Bug Fixes
Fixes text for Oedo Superpass
Fixes Yae missing on character menu
v1.0.14.title: v1.0.14

v1.0.15.description:
Bug Fixes
Fixes fishing quest breaking certain sequences
Fixes certain textboxes from overrunning array limits.
v1.0.15.title: v1.0.15

v1.0.2.description:
Solves issues with Typos, boss fights, some broken item locations and implements a base line for some item text replacement I'll be doing later.

This REQUIRES usage of the newly published client https://github.com/klorfmorf/Goemon64Recomp/releases/tag/v0.2.0-dev
v1.0.2.title: v1.0.2

v1.0.3.description:
New Features
- Start with all flute locations unlocked
- Press Start to Skip Dragon Animation

Bug Fixes
- Jump Gym Key lockup
- Enemy Crash due to dancing legs
- Oedo Warp putting you out of bounds
- Oedo spawn sometimes putting you out of bounds
- Starting Characters sometimes not granting
v1.0.3.title: v1.0.3

v1.0.4.description:
Bug Fixes
- Solves Festival Temple Fire Platforms from being despawned

New Adjustments
- Adds jetpack into logic for Chain pipe jumps
v1.0.4.title: v1.0.4

v1.0.5.description:
Crash fixes for multiple rooms
Fixes Ghost Toys
Fixes Can Can Legs
Fixes Jet Pack Logic
*hopefully* fixes a bug with starting characters getting removed

*Important* 
This lays the foundation for built in hints, there are Yaml options for it now but currently they do nothing.
v1.0.5.title: v1.0.5

v1.0.7.description: Fixes flag id data for pots and ryo
v1.0.7.title: v1.0.7

You can now buy hints from PLASMA regarding your seed

v1.0.9.description:
Bugfixes
Fixes text on cutscene textboxes
Solves a oneway door issue in festival temple
Restricts enemies in certain ghost toys rooms

Adds a logo

v1.1.0.description:
### First Stable Release!
### Bugfixes
Yae vanishing has been fixed
Ryo values have been balanced when rando options are enabled

v1.1.0.title: v1.1.0
